nasb.text: Then Saul immediately fell full length upon the ground and was very afraid because of the words of Samuel; also there was no strength in him, for he had eaten no food all day and all night.

esv.text: Then Saul fell at once full length on the ground, filled with fear because of the words of Samuel. And there was no strength in him, for he had eaten nothing all day and all night.

cnv.text: 掃羅立刻全身仆倒在地上，他因撒母耳的話，非常懼怕，又因為他已經一日一夜沒有吃飯，所以一點氣力也沒有。

ccb.text: 扫罗听了撒母耳的话，顿时吓得浑身僵直，倒在地上，一天一夜没有进食，毫无力气。
